name: GOLFTEC Sarasota
address: 6249 Lake Osprey Dr, Lakewood Ranch, FL 34240
about: GOLFTEC Sarasota is a technology-driven golf training studio specializing in data-driven swing improvement. The facility provides indoor lessons using advanced motion measurement systems like OPTIMOTION and launch monitors to help golfers analyze their technique. Services include private coaching, club fitting, and practice memberships, with a focus on personalized game plans for players of all skill levels. The studio operates with certified PGA coaches and offers a structured approach to skill development through technology-enabled feedback and training programs.
why_golfers_like_it: Data-driven swing analysis using advanced motion capture technology
PGA-certified coaches providing personalized improvement plans
Comprehensive services including lessons, fittings, and practice access
Indoor climate-controlled training environment for year-round practice
Pro shop offering discounted equipment for members

simulator_hardware.notes: Launch monitors used for swing analysis and club fitting

faq.question: Do I need my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: Club rentals are available, though many students prefer to use their own clubs for fitting and consistency

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No external food or drink service is mentioned, though the facility appears focused on training rather than dining

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Virtual simulation capabilities allow for practice sessions of various lengths, though 18-hole virtual play times aren't specified

faq.question: Is it kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC offers junior programs and welcomes younger golfers with age-appropriate coaching and equipment
